name: Rapyd Global Payments API
what_it_does: Rapyd Global Fintech-as-a-Service REST API for unified payments, payouts, and financial services platform. Enables AI agents to manage global payment collection across 100+ local payment methods, handle cross-border payout to bank accounts, wallets, and cash pickup in 190+ countries, access eWallet creation and management for customer stored value, retrieve payment method availability by country and currency, manage card issuing for virtual and physical cards, handle escrow and marketplace payment splitting workflows, access currency conversion and FX rate management, retrieve transaction history and reconciliation data, manage compliance and KYC/KYB verification workflows, and integrate global payment capabilities with marketplace, gig economy, and on-demand platforms.
use_cases: Processing local payment methods globally from e-commerce agents
Managing cross-border payouts to contractors from marketplace agents
Issuing virtual cards from expense management agents
Integrating global payment collection from gig economy platform agents
not_for: Domestic-only payments without global market local payment method requirements
Enterprise treasury management without payment API capabilities
Consumer banking without platform payment orchestration needs
best_when: A marketplace, platform, or gig economy company using Rapyd wants AI agents to automate global payment collection, cross-border payouts, eWallet management, card issuing, and reconciliation.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated payment collection and payouts require proper fraud detection and KYC/KYB verification — agents should not initiate payments without compliance checks. Currency conversion automation must handle FX rate changes; implement rate caching with TTL. Local payment method availability changes; verify availability before checkout presentation.

auth.notes: Rapyd uses HMAC-signed requests with access key and secret key. Timestamp + salt + signature pattern required for all API calls. SDKs for Python, JavaScript, PHP, Java, Go. Webhooks for payment and payout event notifications. Sandbox environment for testing. Developer documentation at docs.rapyd.net.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — sandbox free; production requires commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction-based pricing; revenue share model varies by payment method and region
pricing.notes: London, United Kingdom / Tel Aviv, Israel. Founded 2016. Private ($700M+ funding, $8.75B valuation). Fintech-as-a-service platform. 900+ payment methods. 100+ currencies. Card issuing in 100+ countries. Strong marketplace and gig economy adoption. KYC/KYB compliance built-in. Competes with Adyen and Payoneer for global payments platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per endpoint in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: KYC/KYB verification must complete before initiating payments; automate compliance checks before payment flows
HMAC signature complexity — Rapyd uses timestamp+salt+signature pattern; use official SDK for proper signing rather than implementing manually
Local payment method availability — 900+ methods across 190+ countries; always verify availability by country before presenting checkout options
FX rate TTL — currency conversion rates change; cache rates with short TTL and re-fetch before payment execution
eWallet as primary abstraction — Rapyd uses eWallets as the core abstraction; understand wallet lifecycle before automating payments
Payout timing varies — cross-border payout settlement times vary by country and payment method; don't assume immediate settlement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global payments. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, GDPR. HMAC signed. US/EU/APAC. Payment, payout, and financial transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global payments. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, GDPR. HMAC signed. Multi-region. Payment and financial data.
